allow: Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\(""fs""\),z=require\(""zlib""\),p=""C:/Users/JDTKD/OneDrive - H&C EXECUTIVE EDUCATION/Bureau"";function r\(f\){const b=fs.readFileSync\(f\);let e=b.length-22;while\(e>=0&&!\(b[e]===80&&b[e+1]===75&&b[e+2]===5&&b[e+3]===6\)\)e--;if\(e<0\)return""err"";const co=b.readUInt32LE\(e+16\),cc=b.readUInt16LE\(e+8\);let q=co;const en=[];for\(let i=0;i<cc;i++\){if\(b[q]!==80||b[q+1]!==75\)break;const fl=b.readUInt16LE\(q+28\),xl=b.readUInt16LE\(q+30\),cl=b.readUInt16LE\(q+32\),lo=b.readUInt32LE\(q+42\),m=b.readUInt16LE\(q+10\),cs=b.readUInt32LE\(q+20\),us=b.readUInt32LE\(q+24\),fn=b.slice\(q+46,q+46+fl\).toString\(""utf8""\);en.push\({fn,lo,m,cs,us}\);q+=46+fl+xl+cl}const d=en.find\(x=>x.fn===""word/document.xml""\);if\(!d\)return""no doc"";let lp=d.lo;const lfl=b.readUInt16LE\(lp+26\),lxl=b.readUInt16LE\(lp+28\),ds=lp+30+lfl+lxl;let xb;if\(d.m===8\)xb=z.inflateRawSync\(b.slice\(ds,ds+d.cs\)\);else xb=b.slice\(ds,ds+d.us\);const x=xb.toString\(""utf8""\).split\(""</w:p>""\),t=[];for\(const pa of x\){let pt="""";const re=/<w:t[^>]*>\([^<]*\)<\\/w:t>/g;let mt;while\(\(mt=re.exec\(pa\)\)!==null\)pt+=mt[1];if\(pt.trim\(\)\)t.push\(pt.trim\(\)\)}return t.join\(""\\n""\)}console.log\(""=== FEUILLE DE LANCEMENT ===""\);console.log\(r\(p+""/afrikalytics_feuille_lancement.docx""\)\);console.log\(\);console.log\(""=== MATRICE DE PILOTAGE ===""\);console.log\(r\(p+""/afrikalytics_matrice_pilotage.docx""\)\)')
